loomstack1001.title: Feature ID does not match folder name
loomstack1001.repair: Rename the folder or update feature.yaml so the feature ID matches the folder name.

loomstack1002.title: Missing or invalid feature manifest field
loomstack1002.repair: Add the required field to feature.yaml using the canonical manifest shape.

loomstack1003.title: Manifest action is not exported
loomstack1003.repair: Create the action file or update the manifest action name.

loomstack1004.title: Exported action is missing from manifest
loomstack1004.repair: Add the action name to feature.yaml or remove the action implementation.

loomstack1005.title: Duplicate route path
loomstack1005.repair: Change one route path so every route path is globally unique.

loomstack1006.title: Invalid feature manifest YAML
loomstack1006.repair: Fix the YAML syntax and run loomstack verify again.

loomstack1007.title: Manifest query is not exported
loomstack1007.repair: Create the query file or update the manifest query name.

loomstack1008.title: Exported query is missing from manifest
loomstack1008.repair: Add the query name to feature.yaml or remove the query implementation.

loomstack1009.title: Manifest view is not exported
loomstack1009.repair: Create the declared *.view.tsx file or update the route view in feature.yaml.

loomstack1010.title: Manifest entity is not exported
loomstack1010.repair: Export the entity from model.schema.ts or update the manifest entity name.

loomstack1011.title: Invalid feature name
loomstack1011.repair: Use a lowercase kebab-case feature name such as project-notes.

loomstack2001.title: Forbidden database import in UI file
loomstack2001.repair: Move database access into queries/*.query.ts or actions/*.action.ts.

loomstack2002.title: Forbidden raw fetch in UI file
loomstack2002.repair: Use the generated loomstack action/query client.

loomstack2003.title: Koa import in feature logic
loomstack2003.repair: Remove the Koa dependency and use LoomStackRequestContext.

loomstack3001.title: Action input validation failed
loomstack3001.repair: Send input matching the action input schema.

loomstack3002.title: Runtime output validation failed
loomstack3002.repair: Return a value matching the declared output schema.

loomstack3003.title: Authentication required
loomstack3003.repair: Authenticate the request before calling this operation.

loomstack4001.title: Generated file was manually modified
loomstack4001.repair: Run loomstack generate or move custom logic out of the generated file.

loomstack4040.title: Unknown action
loomstack4040.repair: Use an action declared in feature.yaml and run loomstack generate.

loomstack4041.title: Unknown query
loomstack4041.repair: Use a query declared in feature.yaml and run loomstack generate.

loomstack4050.title: Invalid RPC method
loomstack4050.repair: Send the action or query request with HTTP POST.

loomstack5001.title: Missing loomstack config
loomstack5001.repair: Create loomstack.config.ts or run the command inside a loomstack project.

loomstack5002.title: Target already exists
loomstack5002.repair: Choose another name or remove the existing target first.

loomstack5003.title: Invalid project configuration
loomstack5003.repair: Use React, Koa, PostgreSQL, pnpm, and explicit featuresDir/generatedDir values.

loomstack6001.title: Unsupported PostgreSQL field
loomstack6001.repair: Use a supported scalar field or provide explicit persistence logic.
